en: For playing with roses, put you in the mood
When you're sitting on my face, that's my type of view
ko: 내 얼굴 위에 앉아있을 때 그게 내가 좋아하는 풍경이야

en: Can I swim in your ocean? Can I drown in it too?
Baby, when I go deep, touching your soul
I'll make you come over, over and over
ko: 계속, 계속, 또 계속 그리고 천천히 너를 가질 거야

en: And I'll fuck you slow, and I'll fuck you slow
